unconditional_note: baseline shares correlate with climate/amenity; share-exogeneity does NOT hold, as expected
identification: NOT share exogeneity. Rests on: (i) direct controls for the amenity channel (hi_amenity, winter_tmin_anom); (ii) county and year FE absorbing time-invariant amenity; (iii) leave-one-out NATIONAL crop shocks as the within-county identifying variation (Borusyak-Hull-Jaravel shock exogeneity); (iv) null placebo in low-farm-intensity counties.
refs: Goldsmith-Pinkham, Sorkin & Swift 2020; Borusyak, Hull & Jaravel 2022
